five_groups.title: Eat food from at least 3 of the 5 Diet mod groups — start building your nutrition profile

diet_warning.title: Learn the death reset rule — Diet resets FULLY on death. Keep your diet active.

subtitle.text: Diet resets fully on death. This is not a punishment. It is a reminder that the body has a record too.

description: ▸ Diet mod tracks what you eat across 5 food groups.
Maximum coverage gives permanent stat bonuses.
The bonuses compound — every group adds to the previous.
└ ▲ Farmer's Delight (and addons) is the primary
engine for covering all 5 groups efficiently
└ ▲ Youkai's Feasts adds 143+ items — Ch05+ coverage
Even with limited food, try to hit grain + protein + fruit.
The bonuses are immediate and significant.
Dying and restarting from zero hurts more the longer you wait.
◇ Farmer's Delight (Ch02) makes diet coverage trivial.
